source: SBI Card India public summaries (approximate; verify fees and earn rates with sbicard.com). Replace or merge this file with your 'SBI Credit Card data' export if you use a different list.

cards.reward_rate: Accelerated reward points on online spends and partner merchants; base earn elsewhere (see SBI Card T&Cs)
cards.key_benefits: E-commerce focused earn with milestone e-vouchers per issuer rules

cards.reward_rate: Accelerated points on dining, movies, departmental stores and groceries; base earn on other retail
cards.key_benefits: Everyday category accelerators with simple redemption options

cards.reward_rate: Cashback on online spends, utility bills and select categories; see issuer for current slabs
cards.best_for: Cashback on digital and utility spends
cards.key_benefits: Straight cashback structure with online and bill-pay focus

cards.reward_rate: Accelerated reward points on dining, groceries, movies and department stores; milestone benefits per program
cards.lounge_access: Complimentary domestic airport lounge visits per issuer rules
cards.key_benefits: Lounge access, milestone rewards and strong category earn

cards.reward_rate: Premium earn on travel, international spends and lifestyle categories; transfer and voucher options per issuer
cards.lounge_access: Domestic and international lounge program where included
cards.key_benefits: Travel vouchers/milestones, lounge access and concierge-style perks

cards.reward_rate: Accelerated reward points on IRCTC and rail-related spends; base earn on other purchases
cards.lounge_access: Railway lounge access where program applies
cards.key_benefits: Co-branded rail rewards and fare savings per issuer campaigns

cards.reward_rate: Accelerated reward points on fuel at BPCL outlets and partner spends; surcharge waiver per T&Cs
cards.key_benefits: BPCL co-brand with strong earn on fuel and milestones
